## Code Quality Findings

### 1. Redundant `.toString()` in template literals — widespread

Template literals coerce values to strings automatically. All of these are redundant:

**commons-client/src/entities/walker.ts**
- Lines 29, 136, 147, 157, 167: `` `HTTP ${r.status.toString()}` `` → `` `HTTP ${r.status}` ``
- Lines 112–113: `` `${left.toString()}px` `` / `` `${top.toString()}px` `` → `` `${left}px` `` / `` `${top}px` ``
